name: double-wechat
description: Manage multiple WeChat instances on macOS via natural language.

interface.shortDescription: Manage multiple WeChat instances on macOS via natural language.
interface.longDescription: List, create, start, delete, and update copies of WeChat.app on macOS. All operations run as the current user (no sudo required when the user is in the admin group). Backed by a local double-wechat shell binary.
defaultPrompt: 把所有副本同步到最新版本
